title: [train_gpt.py] Autodetect muon warmup from measured step speed
author: flappybird1084

data.description: Autodetects Muon momentum warmup length from measured warmup step speed, timing the second half of warmup steps after JIT settles and setting warmup to 25% of estimated total steps, capped to [20, 500].

novel_contributions: Auto-detect Muon momentum warmup length from measured step timing
Use warmup-step timing after JIT settles to estimate total training steps
Set Muon warmup to 25% of estimated total steps with bounds [20, 500]
Fallback to 100 warmup steps when no timing data is available
